switcher.heading: Switch space
plugin.name: Spaces
ctb.scope.label: Tenant scope
ctb.scope.description: Whether entries are partitioned per Space or shared platform-wide.
ctb.scope.space.title: Space
ctb.scope.space.description: Entries are partitioned per Space; each Space sees only its own data.
ctb.scope.platform.title: Platform
ctb.scope.platform.description: Entries are shared across every Space (global).
ctb.visibleIn.label: Visible in spaces
ctb.visibleIn.description: Restrict which spaces this content type appears in. Leave all checked to make it visible everywhere.
move.action.label: Move to space…
move.dialog.title: Move to another space
move.dialog.body: Move {count, plural, one {this entry} other {these # entries}} to:
move.dialog.empty: No other space is eligible for this content type. Add a space to the CT's "Visible in spaces" binding first.
move.success: {count, plural, one {Entry moved} other {# entries moved}} to {space}.
visibilityField.label: Available in spaces
visibilityField.hint: Uncheck spaces to limit visibility. With every space checked the row is platform-wide.
defaultPicker.label: Default in spaces
defaultPicker.hint: Pick one or more spaces this locale should be the default in. Picking a space here also adds it to "Available in spaces" automatically.
defaultPicker.placeholder: Not the default in any space
